design_plan: rng=42; AIDA_pass=true; hero_max_width=1120; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_checked=true; button_contrast=AA
headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: Gemini is pushing hard into agentic automation with Gemini Spark on macOS, connected apps, and real‑time tracking. Super is built specifically for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer and gets better over time by reusing a computer-use cache — making repeated workflows faster and cheaper.
